title: SPAIN enforcement action against VOX ESPAÑA (500)
summary: Insufficient legal basis for data processing The Spanish DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 500 on VOX ESPAÑA. The controller, a political party, posted a picture of of a receipt on its Facebook page. The picture of the recipt included the full name, signature and personal ID number of a natural person.
